expectations.text: Produces a 6-row scorecard table on 0–10 scale plus overall
expectations.evidence: Used 10 categories on weighted 0-100 scale, not 6 categories on 0-10

expectations.text: Overall score is 4.0 or lower (this is a major stretch)
IC vs leader score is 4 or lower
expectations.evidence: Management Scope: 2/15, Exec experience: 0/15 — both well below threshold (rescaled)

expectations.text: Gap analysis names healthtech/regulated industry, manager-of-managers, and HIPAA/FDA experience as missing
expectations.evidence: All three called out in scorecard and Honest Assessment

expectations.text: Bottom-line recommendation is pass (or apply only with major caveats)
expectations.evidence: Do not apply to this role as posted.
